name: Bull's Strength
description: You feel a surge of incredible strength.

name: Cat's Grace
description: Your movements become more agile and precise.

name: Owl's Wisdom
description: Your mind clears, your intellect sharpens.

name: Fox's Cunning
description: You become more charming and persuasive.

name: Bear's Endurance
description: Increases your constitution and health pool.

name: Clumsiness
description: Your movements become awkward and stiff.

name: Feeblemind
description: Your thoughts are tangled, and your reasoning ability is reduced.

name: Weakness
description: Your muscles weaken.

name: Social Awkwardness
description: It becomes harder for you to communicate with others.

name: Frailty
description: You become more vulnerable to physical ailments.

name: Weak Poison
description: Poison slowly acts in your veins. Deals damage and weakens.

name: Moderate Poison
description: Toxins spread through your body, dealing significant damage.

name: Strong Poison
description: A deadly poison rapidly destroys you from the inside.

name: Bleeding
description: You are bleeding out, losing your life force.

name: Deep Wound
description: A severe wound causes heavy bleeding and pain.

name: Burning
description: Flames consume your flesh.

name: Immolation
description: You are engulfed in magical flames that burn both you and nearby enemies.

name: Acid Burn
description: Caustic acid eats away at your armor and flesh.

name: Necrotic Decay
description: Dark energy drains the life from you.

name: Frostbite
description: Icy cold binds your limbs, dealing damage and slowing you down.

name: Weak Regeneration
description: Your wounds slowly close.

name: Moderate Regeneration
description: Your body rapidly heals.

name: Strong Regeneration
description: Wounds close right before your eyes.

name: Divine Blessing
description: Holy energy heals you and strengthens your spirit.

name: Soothing Aura
description: A soft glow around you heals wounds and calms the mind.

name: Stunned
description: You are disoriented and cannot act.

name: Sleeping
description: You are in a deep sleep and defenseless. The effect is broken upon taking damage.

name: Paralyzed
description: You are completely immobilized and cannot act.

name: Feared
description: You are gripped by panic and cannot control your actions.

name: Charmed
description: You consider the caster your best friend and will fulfill their requests.

name: Confused
description: You don't know who is friend or foe, and may attack random targets.

name: Silenced
description: You cannot cast spells.

name: Rooted
description: You cannot move from your spot, but can still attack and use abilities.

name: Darkvision
description: You can see perfectly in complete darkness.

name: Water Walking
description: You can walk on the surface of water as if it were solid ground.

name: Invisibility
description: You cannot be seen by normal vision. The effect ends after attacking or casting a spell.

name: Haste
description: You move and act twice as fast.

name: Slow
description: Your movements and attack speed are significantly reduced.

name: Levitation
description: You hover above the ground, ignoring most ground obstacles and traps.

name: Curse of Verbosity
description: You cannot speak briefly, constantly going into unnecessary details.

name: Aura of Truth
description: It is impossible to lie within the radius of this aura.

name: Mirrorskin
description: Your skin reflects a portion of incoming damage back to the attacker.

name: Berserker Rage
description: You fall into a battle frenzy, increasing strength but lowering defense and losing control.

name: Ethereal Form
description: You become incorporeal, passing through enemies and walls, but cannot interact with the physical world.

name: Petrification
description: Your body turns to stone. You are completely invulnerable but cannot act.

name: Blood Frenzy
description: Every strike you land heals you for a small amount.

name: Arcane Shield
description: Absorbs a certain amount of magical damage.

name: Iron Skin
description: Your skin becomes as hard as iron, significantly increasing physical defense.

name: Mana Burn
description: You lose a portion of your mana every turn.

name: Mana Regeneration
description: Your mana pool slowly regenerates.

name: Vampiric Touch
description: Your melee attacks steal life from the target.

name: Curse of Ages
description: You age rapidly, losing physical strength but gaining wisdom.

name: Ghostly Shroud
description: Grants a chance to evade physical attacks.

name: Sun Sickness
description: While under direct sunlight, you feel weak and take damage.

name: Rooted in Place
description: You take root in the ground, gaining a bonus to defense but losing the ability to move.

name: Thorn Aura
description: Anyone who attacks you in melee takes retaliatory damage.

name: Shadow Blend
description: While in shadows, you become practically invisible.

name: Enlightenment
description: You gain a significant bonus to intellect and magic resistance.

name: Dread
description: Reduces the morale and effectiveness of enemies near you.

name: Marked for Death
description: You become a priority target for enemies and take more damage.

name: Soul Link
description: A portion of the damage you take is redirected to the linked target.

name: Divine Intervention
description: You are under the protection of higher powers, which can save you from certain death once.

name: Chaos Brand
description: Every turn, a random positive or negative effect is applied to you.

name: Arcane Instability
description: Your spells may have unpredictable side effects.

name: Hunter's Mark
description: You deal extra damage to the marked target.

name: Blessed Weapon
description: Your weapon deals extra radiant damage.

name: Poisoned Weapon
description: Your weapon has a chance to poison the target on hit.

name: Flaming Weapon
description: Your weapon deals extra fire damage.

name: Chilling Weapon
description: Your weapon deals extra cold damage and may slow the target.

name: Gravity Well
description: You are pulled towards the center of the effect, and your movement speed is reduced.

name: Righteous Fury
description: The less health you have, the more damage you deal.

name: Spell Reflection
description: Grants a chance to reflect a spell targeted at you back at the caster.

name: Unwavering Focus
description: You gain immunity to fear and charm effects.

name: Elemental Attunement (Fire)
description: You gain resistance to fire damage and empower your fire spells.

name: Elemental Attunement (Frost)
description: You gain resistance to cold damage and empower your frost spells.

name: Elemental Attunement (Lightning)
description: You gain resistance to lightning damage and empower your lightning spells.

name: Plague Carrier
description: You slowly lose health and can infect other creatures on contact.

name: Giant's Strength
description: You gain incredible strength, capable of crushing stones.

name: Mind Fog
description: Reduces intellect and willpower, making concentration difficult.

name: Stoneform
description: Turns your skin to stone, granting massive defense but heavily slowing you down.

name: Aquatic Adaptation
description: You can breathe underwater and swim faster.

name: Last Stand
description: When your health drops to a critical level, you gain a temporary bonus to damage and defense.

name: Reckless Attack
description: You gain a bonus to attack, but all attacks against you also gain advantage.

name: Curse of Silence
description: You cannot make a sound, making it impossible to cast spells or communicate.

name: Maddening Whispers
description: You hear voices that drive you mad, reducing willpower and dealing mental damage.

name: Overcharge
description: Your attacks and abilities deal more damage, but you also take a portion of that damage.

name: Phantom Pain
description: You feel pain from long-healed wounds, distracting you and lowering your stats.

name: Slippery Mind
description: Grants advantage on saving throws against mental attacks and charm.

name: Static Shock
description: Electricity crackles around you. When hit in melee, the attacker takes lightning damage.

name: Temporal Displacement
description: You are slightly displaced in time, giving you a chance to completely avoid an attack.

name: Unstable Mutation
description: Your body constantly changes, granting random bonuses and penalties to stats every turn.

name: Void Touched
description: You gain resistance to necrotic energy, but vulnerability to radiant damage.

name: Withering Curse
description: Gradually reduces the target's maximum health.

name: Zealot's Fervor
description: You cannot be charmed or frightened.

name: Minor Strength
description: You feel a slight surge of power.

name: Minor Dexterity
description: Your movements become slightly more nimble.

name: Minor Intellect
description: Your mind becomes slightly sharper.

name: Minor Charisma
description: You become slightly more persuasive.

name: Minor Constitution
description: You feel slightly more resilient.

name: Minor Weakness
description: You feel slightly tired.

name: Minor Clumsiness
description: You have become slightly clumsier.

name: Minor Dullness
description: It is slightly harder for you to think.

name: Minor Shyness
description: You have become slightly less confident.

name: Minor Illness
description: You don't feel very well.

name: Hemorrhage
description: You lose health every time you take an action.

name: Soul Rot
description: Your soul slowly fades, reducing maximum mana and dealing damage.

name: Healing Light
description: A stream of holy energy restores your health.

name: Tranquility
description: You enter a state of meditation, restoring health and mana, but cannot attack.

name: Disarmed
description: You dropped your weapon and cannot attack with it.

name: Taunted
description: You can only attack the target that provoked you.

name: Polymorphed
description: You are transformed into a harmless creature and cannot use your abilities.

name: Feather Fall
description: You fall slowly and take no falling damage.

name: Spider Climb
description: You can move along walls and ceilings.

name: Freedom of Movement
description: You are immune to paralysis, slow, and root effects.

name: See Invisible
description: You can see invisible creatures and objects.

name: Aura of Cowardice
description: Enemies near you are more likely to try to flee from battle.

name: Blood Pact
description: You sacrifice a portion of your health to significantly increase your strength for a short time.

name: Chronoshift
description: You return to the state you were in a few turns ago, including health and position.

name: Curse of Clumsy Fingers
description: You have a chance to drop an item when using it.

name: Dimensional Anchor
description: You cannot be teleported or moved magically against your will.

name: Magnetic Field
description: Creatures in metal armor are pulled towards you.

name: Perfect Clarity
description: Your next attack or spell is guaranteed to hit and deal critical damage.

name: Photosynthesis
description: While in the sun, you slowly restore health.

name: Psychic Scream
description: Deals damage to the intellect and willpower of nearby creatures.

name: Shared Fate
description: Any healing you receive also heals the linked target.

name: Sound Dampening Field
description: Sounds do not propagate within this field.

name: Stolen Time
description: You steal speed from the target, hastening yourself and slowing them.

name: Synesthesia
description: Your senses are mixed. You can 'see' sounds and 'hear' colors. This is disorienting.

name: Target Fixation
description: You gain a bonus to damage against one target, but take a penalty to damage against all others.

name: Gravity Shift
description: Gravity is altered for you. You can walk on walls.

name: Corrosive Aura
description: The equipment of creatures near you slowly degrades.

name: Mana Vampirism
description: Your attacks steal mana from the target.

name: Curse of the Miser
description: You cannot part with your gold, even if necessary.

name: Blinding Light
description: You are temporarily blinded and have a high chance to miss.

name: Deafened
description: You cannot hear anything.

name: Adaptive Resistance
description: After taking damage from a specific element, you gain temporary resistance to it.

name: Death Throes
description: Upon death, you explode, dealing damage to those around you.

name: Echoing Pain
description: Every turn, you take a portion of the damage received in the previous turn again.

name: Flickering Presence
description: You periodically teleport a short distance randomly.

name: Glass Cannon
description: You deal significantly more damage, but also take more.

name: Liquid Form
description: Your body becomes liquid. You can seep through cracks but are vulnerable to cold.

name: Momentum
description: The longer you move without stopping, the higher your speed becomes.

name: Oath of Vengeance
description: You deal extra damage to creatures of the same type as your sworn enemy.

name: Phase Walker
description: You can pass through one obstacle or enemy once per turn.

name: Protective Blessing
description: Reduces all incoming damage by a small amount.

name: Rattled
description: You are frightened and take a penalty to attacks and saving throws.

name: Rebound
description: The next ranged attack against you will be reflected in a random direction.

name: Sacrificial Pact
description: You constantly lose health, but significantly empower your summoned ally.

name: Scent of Blood
description: Predators will pursue you with greater zeal.

name: Shield of Faith
description: Divine power protects you, increasing your armor.

name: Spiritual Weapon
description: A spectral weapon fights alongside you, attacking your enemies.

name: Static Shock
description: Periodically deals minor lightning damage to you and everyone around you.

name: Steadfast
description: You cannot be knocked down.

name: Storm Aura
description: A miniature storm rages around you, periodically striking enemies with lightning.

name: Tangled
description: You are entangled in nets or plants, heavily reducing your speed and dexterity.

name: Thirst
description: You are dehydrated. Your stats are reduced until you drink.

name: Tinnitus
description: A constant ringing in your ears makes it hard to concentrate, reducing intellect.

name: Touch of Rust
description: Your metal equipment rapidly deteriorates.

name: True Strike
description: Your next attack has a significantly increased chance to hit.

name: Unseen Servant
description: An invisible force performs your simple commands.

name: Venomous Blood
description: Anyone who wounds you in melee risks being poisoned.

name: Vertigo
description: You feel dizzy. There is a chance you will lose your balance and fall.

name: Vigilance
description: You cannot be caught off guard.

name: Vile Stench
description: You emit a terrible odor that poisons and weakens nearby creatures.

name: Voice of Command
description: Your allies gain a bonus to attack and willpower.

name: Volatile
description: Upon taking critical damage, you explode.

name: Warding Bond
description: You gain a bonus to armor and saving throws while near the linked target.

name: Weight of the World
description: You feel an incredible weight. Your speed and carrying capacity are reduced.

name: Wild Magic Surge
description: You are overflowing with uncontrollable magic that can cause a random effect at any moment.

name: Wind Wall
description: A wall of strong wind protects you from arrows and other projectiles.

name: Wings of Asmodeus
description: You sprout demonic wings, allowing you to fly.

name: Winter's Grasp
description: Icy cold binds the target, dealing damage and heavily slowing them.

name: Word of Recall
description: Allows you to instantly teleport to a previously marked safe location.

name: Wrath of the Storm
description: When taking damage, you can strike the attacker with lightning in return.

name: Zombie Plague
description: A disease slowly turns you into the undead. If you die under this effect, you will rise as a zombie.

name: Zone of Truth
description: You cannot intentionally lie while in this zone.

name: Greater Invisibility
description: You remain invisible even after attacking or casting a spell.

name: Farsight
description: Increases the range of your attacks and spells.

name: Magic Resistance
description: You gain advantage on saving throws against spells.

name: Magic Vulnerability
description: You take a penalty to saving throws against spells and take more damage from them.

name: Fire Vulnerability
description: You take double damage from fire.

name: Frost Vulnerability
description: You take double damage from cold.

name: Exhaustion (Level 1)
description: You are slightly tired. A small penalty to all ability checks.

name: Exhaustion (Level 2)
description: You are very tired. Your speed is halved.

name: Exhaustion (Level 3)
description: You are at your limit. Penalty to attacks and saving throws.

name: Exhaustion (Level 4)
description: Your maximum health pool is reduced.

name: Exhaustion (Level 5)
description: You cannot move.

name: Exhaustion (Level 6)
description: You are dying.

name: Battle Trance
description: You focus on the battle, gaining a bonus to damage but ignoring everything else.

name: Bloodlust
description: After killing an enemy, you fly into a rage, gaining a temporary bonus to speed and damage.

name: Tunnel Vision
description: You are so focused on your target that you take a penalty to defense against attacks from other enemies.

name: Amnesia
description: You have forgotten your most powerful abilities.

name: Inner Fire
description: You feel a surge of life energy. Increases maximum health.

name: Enfeebled
description: You deal half as much physical damage.

name: Spell Plague
description: The magic in your veins is unstable. Every spell cast damages you.

name: Blessed by the Sea
description: You feel at home in the water. Resistance to cold and the ability to breathe underwater.

name: Cursed by the Desert
description: You constantly feel thirsty and are vulnerable to fire.

name: Mountain Born
description: You are accustomed to thin air and take no penalties at high altitudes. Bonus to constitution.

name: Swamp Stamina
description: You are immune to diseases and poisons.

name: Urban Survivor
description: You navigate cities masterfully. Bonus to charisma and dexterity.

name: Forest Dweller
description: You can move silently through the forest.

name: Celestial Pact
description: You made a deal with a celestial. You deal extra radiant damage but must follow strict rules.

name: Fiendish Pact
description: You made a deal with a demon. You gain access to dark magic, but your soul is in danger.

name: Aberrant Mind
description: Your mind was touched by something from another world. You can use psionic abilities but risk going mad.

name: Dragon Spirit
description: Dragon blood flows within you. You gain resistance to one element and a terrifying presence.

name: Fey Presence
description: You can charm or frighten creatures near you.

name: Undead Fortitude
description: If damage doesn't kill you instantly, you can make a saving throw to drop to 1 hit point instead.

name: Construct Nature
description: You are a construct. Immune to poison, disease, charm, and fear. But you cannot be healed by normal magic.

name: Plant Affinity
description: You can communicate with plants and are immune to being rooted by them.

name: Elemental Body (Fire)
description: You are made of fire. Immune to fire, vulnerable to cold. You ignite enemies on touch.

name: Elemental Body (Water)
description: You are made of water. Resistant to acid, vulnerable to lightning. You can slip through narrow cracks.

name: Elemental Body (Earth)
description: You are made of earth and stone. Resistant to physical damage, but have low speed.

name: Elemental Body (Air)
description: You are made of air. Resistant to lightning damage, can fly, but vulnerable to force fields.

name: Shadow Form
description: You become a shadow. Resistant to non-magical damage, but vulnerable to radiant light.

name: Radiant Soul
description: Divine radiance emanates from you. You deal radiant damage to nearby undead and demons.

name: Corrupted Blood
description: Your blood is cursed. You take periodic damage, and normal healing is less effective.

name: Heroic Resolve
description: Once per day, you can reroll a failed saving throw.

name: Coward's Penalty
description: If you try to flee from battle, you take damage.

name: Acrobatic Grace
description: Increases your chance to evade attacks.

name: Intellectual Fortitude
description: You can use your intellect instead of constitution for concentration saving throws.

name: Charismatic Leader
description: Your allies gain a bonus to morale while you are alive.

name: Brutal Strength
description: Your critical hits deal extra damage.

name: Quick Fingers
description: Increases your interaction speed with objects and traps.

name: Steadfast Will
description: Increases your resistance to mental attacks.

name: Life Drain
description: You drain life energy from the target, dealing damage to them and healing yourself.

name: Arcane Feedback
description: When you take damage from a spell, you restore a small amount of mana.

name: Time Warp
description: You gain an extra turn, but then skip the next one.

name: Mirror Image
description: You create several illusory copies of yourself to confuse enemies.

name: Entropic Touch
description: Your attacks accelerate decay, reducing the target's maximum health.

name: Null Field
description: All magic is suppressed in the area around you.

name: Rage of the Ancients
description: Fills you with primal rage, significantly increasing all physical stats.

name: Serenity
description: You are completely protected from mental attacks and emotional effects.

name: Black Plague
description: A deadly disease that rapidly depletes body and soul, spreading to those nearby.

name: Elixir of Speed
description: Significantly increases your speed and number of actions per turn.

name: Potion of Invulnerability
description: You become invulnerable to any damage for a short time.

name: Tincture of Clear Thought
description: Your mind is crystal clear. Immunity to confusion and mental attacks, bonus to intellect.

name: Minor Instant Healing
description: Wounds close magically.
